news.title: Samsung could make chips for Anthropic, the world’s most valuable AI startup
news.description: Samsung, one of the world's biggest chip makers, could end up manufacturing AI chips for Anthropic, the US-based AI startup behind Claude. The company's AI model competes with OpenAI's ChatGPT and Google's Gemini. Samsung invests in Anthropic, raising expecta…

news.title: AI giant Anthropic reaches near-trillion dollar valuation
news.description: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic said Thursday it had raised $65 billion in a new funding round that values the Claude maker at $965 billion, more than its archrival OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT.

news.title: Claude Code's creator on the end of the software engineer

news.title: How Anthropic leapfrogged arch rival OpenAI to a near-$1 trillion valuation
news.description: Anthropic’s latest valuation of $965 billion now exceeds that of OpenAI, which was last valued at around $852 billion post-money following its March fundraising.
